ぺこりと頭を下げる同僚の男。<br>彼に向けて、ウィステリアは小さく、普段の声で:
The male colleague bowed his head. Wisteria whispered to him in her
usual low voice.
<size=30>……きみは興奮すると、<br>本当に周りが見えなくなるんだな。: ...You really lose sight of things when you're excited.
その声に驚き、同僚の男が声を失う。<br>そして怯えたように、恐る恐る尋ねた。:
Startled by her words, the male colleague was at a loss for words.
Then, as if frightened, he timidly asked.
さらりと笑顔で言うウィステリア。<br>想像した女性とは余りにも違う微笑みに、男:
Wisteria said lightly with a smile. The man breathed a sigh of relief at
her smile, so different from what he had imagined.
なんだ、気のせいか……。<br>また来ますね！: Oh, it was my imagination... I'll come again!
去っていく男を見送り、ウィステリアはやれやれと肩をすくめる。: Wisteria watched the man leave and shrugged with a sigh.
……森で見た時に、同僚の子がずいぶん気持ち良さそうだったから、<br>欲情させて:
...My colleague was so into it in the forest that I stirred her up and
tried a few things, but...
やはり私の身体には、司令官のものが一番いいみたいだな。: ...As I thought, the Commander's manhood suits my body best.
信頼し、背中を預ける上官と、彼との行為を思い出し、<br>ウィステリアはどこか物:
Recalling the Commander she trusted with her life and their intimacy,
Wisteria muttered, faintly dissatisfied.
